presets.name: balanced
presets.description: General-purpose: mid-size Main, fast Judge. Good default.

presets.name: coding
presets.notes: Switch to this for coding/implementation micro loops.

presets.name: architecting
presets.description: Larger reasoning model for architecture and design tasks.
presets.notes: Use when the task is high-level design or planning.

presets.name: lightweight
presets.description: Both slots use fast small models. Good for slow hardware.
presets.notes: Useful when the GPU is busy or on lower-end hardware.
